idea-plugin.name: Prompt Bundler
idea-plugin.description:
Prompt Bundler turns your codebase into focused, copy-ready prompts, without leaving the IDE.

Attach files, whole folders, or a selected snippet from the editor, then ask your question in the tool window. Prompt Bundler assembles a single, well-structured prompt (a file tree plus the exact file contents) that you can copy into any AI assistant or web chat.
  • Attach context from the Project view, the editor selection, drag and drop, or a quick picker.
  • Binary and oversized files are skipped automatically.
  • Everything stays local: nothing is sent anywhere, you stay in control of the copy.

action.description: Attach the selected file(s) or folder(s) to the Prompt Bundler context
Attach the selected text as a snippet to the Prompt Bundler context
